title: Trump Threatens Iran and Then Pulls Back, All in the Same Day
summary_full: President Trump has repeatedly said he’ll restart military action against Iran, only to stop short of plunging the United States directly back into an unpopular war.
summary_public: President Trump has repeatedly said he’ll restart military action against Iran, only to stop short of plunging the United States directly back into an unpopular war.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump Threatens Iran and Then Pulls Back
